doc_content.summary: A highly-orchestrated multi-agent pipeline that transforms unstructured architectural markdown specs into a fully linked dependency graph of GitHub issues, extracts valuable domain knowledge to the repository's documentation tree, and seamlessly integrates with GitHub Projects.
key_features: Three-pass adversarial LLM pipeline (Evaluate -> Decompose -> Validate)
Automated sizing guardrails preventing monolithic issue creation
Dual-auth execution mapping issue authorship to the user while using app tokens for automation
Dependency graph generation utilizing native GitHub `#NNN` mentions
Automated zero-loss knowledge extraction into docs/decisions.md and domain-specific markdown files

alt_text: A vertical flowchart visualizing the 7-phase architecture of the stark-plan-to-tasks skill, detailing its multi-agent validation passes, GitHub dual-auth strategy, and automated documentation extraction workflow.
